bead.title: agent: AgentRunRuntime struct + RunWithConfig (alongside Run) + NewTestConfigForRun
bead.description:
Stage 2 of SD-024. Adds AgentRunRuntime, the new RunWithConfig method on the agent service path (alongside existing Run), and the NewTestConfigForRun test constructor. Does not migrate any caller yet.

In-scope:
- cli/internal/agent/types.go — add AgentRunRuntime
- cli/internal/agent/runner.go — add RunWithConfig method
- cli/internal/config/testconfig.go — add NewTestConfigForRun + TestRunConfigOpts

Out-of-scope:
- Migrating callers (beads 18-20)
- Retiring RunOptions (bead 22)

Depends on beads 1-3 (foundation), independent of bead 16. See TD-024 §Stage 2.
bead.acceptance: cd cli && go build ./internal/agent/... passes. cd cli && go test -run TestAgentRunRuntimeDelegation ./internal/agent/... passes.
